channel.title: Comments for page "ANTI-PUBLIC Interference"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "ANTI-PUBLIC Interference"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Spoilers:

Lawrence the Preserver

The Extension

The Extension Trial

Edit: The dating system is easy to calculate, and the epoch year's significance can be discovered with a small bit of induction. ;)

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
A companion tale to SCP-3185 exploring some ideas I had about the PDPS that I left out of the article. Image is from Valenti's Wikipedia page and is in the public domain in the USA (or else why would they be using it? ;)

e: Also, my authorial axe is grinding so loudly that it's making me go deaf. :P
